title: 香港知名生殖中心，发生样本严重错配事故 | 原文
content: Hong Kong's Genea reproductive medicine center committed a serious embryo biopsy sample mix-up. Nine samples were involved, with eight incorrectly matched. The incident, affecting two couples undergoing IVF and preimplantation genetic testing in May, was reported to regulators on June 17. The Human Reproductive Technology Authority is investigating the breach.

title: 升级到 gpt-5.6, 10 分钟用了 10% 的额度
content: A user reports rapid consumption of API credits after upgrading to GPT-5.6. On a $100 Pro plan, 10% of quota was used in 10 minutes using the mid-tier Terra model, faster than previous week-long usage. Within hours, remaining quota dropped from 20% to 4% in a 5-hour window. The user notes avoiding the flagship Sol model yet still experiencing unexpectedly fast depletion.

title: 小米终于给中年人造车了
content: Xiaomi unveiled the "Pengcheng" (SkyNomad) extended-range EV series on July 9, targeting middle-aged buyers rather than its traditional young customer base. The full-size SUV features a boxy design, 5.3-meter length, 6/7-seat configurations, and a 1.5T range extender with over 44% thermal efficiency. Priced around $48,000-$62,000, it competes with the AITO M9 and Li Auto L9. Key selling points include flexible interior space with rotating seats and flat floors. However, analysts suggest Xiaomi faces challenges in winning pragmatic middle-aged consumers who prioritize value, luxury features, and resale value over novelty.

title: 电车刚开四年就 “ 老了 ”，还有这规矩？
content: New energy vehicles depreciate faster than gasoline cars due to rapid technology cycles. While fuel vehicles average 8.2 years in age with mature used-car pricing based on mechanical condition, EVs average just 1.8 years, and their value depends heavily on "digital assets"—chip computing power, autonomous driving capability, and software ecosystems—that become obsolete quickly. Industry data shows fuel car replacement cycles run 6–8 years versus 3–5 years for EVs. This creates dilemmas for owners, dealers, and brands alike, as frequent model updates erode consumer trust and resale values. Buyers should separate usage costs from ownership costs, treat smart features as temporary rather than permanent assets, and choose vehicles matching their intended holding period.

还没开始用呢…

title: [GPT 5.6-Sol]超神级使用体验
content: A GPT 5.6-Sol user report highlights two features: highly accurate UI generation via Figma integration and fully automated self-testing that launches simulators, navigates to new pages, takes screenshots, and performs verification. The reviewer notes high resource consumption—two pages at 1.5x speed, 5.6 Sol, and maximum settings exhausted a $100, five-hour credit limit, prompting an upgrade to a $200 plan.
eventKey: gpt-6-sol-超神级使用体验
normalizedTitle: gpt 5 6-sol 超神级使用体验

title: “你知道该怎么做！”阿根廷42岁飞行教练空中突然跳机自杀，22岁女学员在地面指导下安全降落，但受到严重心理创伤 | 原文
content: A 42-year-old Argentine flight instructor in Córdoba Province jumped from an aircraft during a training flight, killing himself. His final words to his 22-year-old student were "You know what to do!" She safely landed the plane with ground guidance but suffered severe psychological trauma. The instructor, Leandro Andrés Bertazzo, had reportedly been experiencing personal difficulties and receiving psychiatric treatment. The incident highlights concerns about pilot mental health.
eventKey: “你知道该怎么做-”阿根廷42岁飞行教练空中突然跳机自杀-22岁女学员在地面指导下安全降落-但受到严重心理创伤

title: GPT-5.6 发布之夜，Codex/ChatGPT 合二为一 | 原文
content: OpenAI launched GPT-5.6 on July 10, alongside ChatGPT Work, an agent product, and the integration of Codex App into ChatGPT's desktop application. The release signals OpenAI's strategy to make ChatGPT a persistent layer on users' computers, shifting focus from model benchmarks to ambient, always-available AI assistance.
eventKey: gpt-5-发布之夜-codex-chatgpt-合二为一
normalizedTitle: gpt-5 6 发布之夜 codex chatgpt 合二为一 原文
